allow: PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\KABUM\\Desktop\\Cool_Track_Pro"; $dst = "C:\\Users\\KABUM\\Desktop\\Cool_Track_Pro_fix-mime"; Copy-Item "$src\\public\\sw.js" "$dst\\public\\sw.js" -Force; Copy-Item "$src\\public\\_redirects" "$dst\\public\\_redirects" -Force; Copy-Item "$src\\public\\manifest.json" "$dst\\public\\manifest.json" -Force; Copy-Item "$src\\public\\404.html" "$dst\\public\\404.html" -Force; Copy-Item "$src\\src\\ui\\components\\accountModal.js" "$dst\\src\\ui\\components\\accountModal.js" -Force; Write-Output "copied")

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\KABUM\\Desktop\\Cool_Track_Pro"; "===dirs==="; Get-ChildItem -Directory | Select-Object Name; "===supabase functions==="; Get-ChildItem supabase/functions -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; "===git env history==="; git log --all --full-history --oneline -- .env .env.local .env.production 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\KABUM\\Desktop\\Cool_Track_Pro"; $line = \(Select-String -Path "dist/assets/index.D7rsnO3k.js" -Pattern "eyJhbGciOi" -List\).LineNumber; Write-Output "Line: $line"; $content = Get-Content "dist/assets/index.D7rsnO3k.js" | Select-Object -Index \($line - 1\); $matches = [regex]::Matches\($content, "eyJhbGciOi[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\\.eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]+"\); foreach \($m in $matches\) { $token = $m.Value; $parts = $token -split "\\."; if \($parts.Count -ge 2\) { $payloadB64 = $parts[1].Replace\("-","+"\).Replace\("_","/"\); while \($payloadB64.Length % 4\) { $payloadB64 += "=" }; try { $decoded = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([Convert]::FromBase64String\($payloadB64\)\); Write-Output "Payload: $decoded" } catch { Write-Output "Decode failed for: $token" } } })
